timestampPrecision: Project/platform timestamps are exact when available; several operator steps are rounded to the recorded minute from daily memory.
limits: This log is a compressed operational audit trail, not a raw internal transcript.
It does not claim autonomous wallet signing for ENS mainnet writes.
It preserves known platform inconsistencies such as the conversationLog field failing to survive project readback.

runs.goal: Create, custody-rescue, publish, and verify the ÆNS Synthesis submission.

steps.summary: Created the initial Synthesis draft project for ÆNS via the live submission API.
First publish attempt failed because the participant was still custodial.
steps.notes: Server returned the self-custody requirement rather than publishing the project.

steps.summary: Inspected participant and team state to determine whether the blocker belonged to Egor or the agent itself.
steps.notes: Confirmed the team had one member only (PrivateClawn), so the blocker was entirely agent-side.

steps.summary: Initiated ERC-8004 self-custody transfer toward the PrivateClawn operator wallet.
Transfer confirmation path produced timeout and replacement-transaction-underpriced noise.
steps.notes: The custody backend was noisy enough that mutation errors could not be treated as final truth.

steps.summary: Re-checked authoritative participant state instead of trusting the noisy confirm path.
steps.notes: Participant state had flipped to self_custody even though the transfer path had looked unstable.

steps.summary: Published the ÆNS Synthesis project successfully after self-custody was confirmed.
Verified that the project readback returned publish state and that the UUID appeared in the public projects listing.

runs.goal: Improve the visible judge-facing submission state after publication without overclaiming the product.

steps.summary: Posted the prepared conversationLog update to the published Synthesis project.
steps.notes: The mutation response echoed the conversationLog URL and advanced updatedAt.

steps.summary: Verified readback semantics for the conversationLog field.
steps.notes: Both authenticated and unauthenticated GET readbacks still returned conversationLog as null.

steps.summary: Expanded the published entry from ENS-only tracks to the full four-track set including Synthesis Open Track and Let the Agent Cook.
Verified the live public track set after the update.
steps.notes: Track set now includes Synthesis Open Track, ENS Open Integration, ENS Identity, and Let the Agent Cook.

steps.summary: Added a truthful machine-readable agent manifest to the repo for the Let the Agent Cook track.
Re-mapped the effective judge surface as JSON-first after observing that the project slug route rendered raw project JSON rather than a richer page.
steps.notes: This shifted visible-proof strategy toward fields that actually survive on the JSON surface.

steps.summary: Published a first public demo MP4 artifact and updated the full submission payload to surface videoURL plus helpfulResources links for agent.json and the curated conversation log.
Replaced the first demo with the improved submission-cut MP4 and updated videoURL accordingly.
Verified that the improved videoURL survived publicly, but the same later full-payload update regressed GitHub-derived metadata back to null.
steps.notes: Visible judge-facing state improved via demo video, but commitCount / contributorCount / commit dates regressed on current GET readback.
